requirement_results.evidence: cargo test -p but-api merge_gate_self_and_stale_dismissed passed; self-approval seeded through approve_review is excluded and unmet contains no_approval

cargo test -p but-api merge_gate_self_and_stale_dismissed passed; approve@H1 then H2 head advance is blocked with approval_stale_at_head, then re-approval@H2 reaches the forge call without governance denial
cargo test -p but-api merge_gate_distinct_current_head_satisfies passed; distinct current-head approval reaches the forge call without governance denial
purity grep passed for review_requirement.rs, delegation grep found review_requirement::evaluate in merge_gate.rs, role-name grep passed, cargo check -p but-api --all-targets passed
self-approval excluded when require_distinct_from_author is set; gate.review_required unmet reason no_approval
approval at H1 dismissed after head advances to H2; unmet reason approval_stale_at_head; fresh H2 approval permits the gate
distinct non-author approval at current head satisfies the requirement
review_requirement.rs has no DB/repo/file/await I/O matches; merge_gate.rs delegates to review_requirement::evaluate; no role labels in evaluator
unmet payload distinguishes no_approval from approval_stale_at_head in merge_gate_self_and_stale_dismissed

red_evidence.failure: self-approval denial should report the no_approval discriminator
distinct current-head approval should satisfy the merge gate

anti_stub_fakeability_notes: Approving verdicts in but-api merge-gate tests are recorded by calling but_api::legacy::forge::approve_review with BUT_AGENT_HANDLE, not by inserting LocalReviewVerdict rows directly.
The self-approval fixture grants the author reviews:write, records an actual governed approval, then proves the evaluator excludes it because require_distinct_from_author is true.

The stale fixture records an approval at concrete H1, advances refs/heads/feat to concrete H2 with a real commit, asserts approval_stale_at_head, then records a fresh governed H2 approval and proves the gate permits execution to reach the forge call.
Positive cases assert absence of governance denial and reaching the forge-bound call, not remote forge completion.
